case_title: DAVID E GARZA VS. FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-19-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
